svg.title: Hamster working 3-session v1
svg.desc: Full scripted working 3-session hamster animation with code terminal, chat, fishing terminal, rod bend, fish bite, and expression motion.
svg.metadata: { "export": "working-3session-keyframes-tuner-v1-page-inline-svg", "state": "working-3session-keyframes-tuner", "derivedFrom": "drafts/sleeping-motion-v1/sleeping-doze-v1/export-v1/hamster-sleeping-loop-v1.svg", "generated": "2026-06-15", "bodyControls": { "bodyLowerWidth": 29, "bodyBottomDrop": 7, "bodySideRound": 0.96, "bodyBottomRound": 1, "bodyLeftBulgeDefault": 0, "bodyLeftBulgeSleepingSource": 14 }, "headLookControls": { "yaw": 0, "source": "idle-look-v2 V15 confirmed yaw geometry", "note": "Yaw is a static tuner control on this page; animation timing will be added only after the pose is confirmed." }, "leftHandControls": { "image": "reference/cutouts/left-hand-cutout-marker-v1-toned-v1.png", "sourceFullCanvas": "reference/cutouts/left-hand-cutout-marker-v1-full-canvas-toned-v1.png", "originalImage": "reference/cutouts/left-hand-cutout-marker-v1.png", "originalFullCanvas": "image": "reference/cutouts/right-hand-arm-no-rod-toned-v1.png", "sourceFullCanvas": "reference/cutouts/right-hand-arm-no-rod-full-canvas-toned-v1.png", "originalImage": "reference/cutouts/right-hand-arm-no-rod.png", "originalFullCanvas": "reference/cutouts/right-hand-arm-no-rod-full-canvas.png", "centerX": 291, "centerY": 284, "width": 100, "height": 102.31, "scale": 1, "rotate": 6.5, "opacity": 1 }, "propControls": { "backCards": { "image": "reference/hamster_back_three_cards.svg", "centerX": 190, "centerY": 232, "width": 1200, "height": 1040, "scale": 0.45, "rotate": 0, "opacity": 0 }, "fishingGear": { "source": "reference/fishing_rod_bobber_water.svg", "centerX": 341, "centerY": 240.5, "width": 1120, "height": 780, "scale": 0.24, "rotate": 0, "opacity": 1 }, "fishTerminal": { "source": "reference/hamster_back_three_cards.svg#water-fishing-card", "centerX": 445.5, "centerY": 299.5, "width": 490, "height": 390, "scale": 0.45, "rotate": 3, "opacity": 1 }, "codeTerminal": { "source": "reference/hamster_back_three_cards.svg#code-editor-card", "centerX": -30.5, "centerY": 95.5, "width": 520, "height": 440, "scale": 0.42, "rotate": -4.75, "opacity": 1 }, "chatTerminal": { "source": "reference/hamster_back_three_cards.svg#chat-card", "centerX": 423, "centerY": 43, "width": 400, "height": 535, "scale": 0.38, "rotate": 6.5, "opacity": 1 } }, "rodDetailControls": { "handle": { "x": 0, "y": 0, "rotate": 0 }, "line": { "x": 846, "topY": 148, "bottomY": 585 }, "bobber": { "x": 846, "y": 650, "rx": 68, "ry": 82 } }, "notes": [ "Left hand uses reference/cutouts/left-hand-cutout-marker-v1-toned-v1.png as an adjustable draft image layer.", "Right hand uses reference/cutouts/right-hand-arm-no-rod-toned-v1.png as an adjustable draft image layer.", "Back cards are hidden on this focused tuner page.", "Fish terminal is inlined from the water/fishing card portion of reference/hamster_back_three_cards.svg and excludes the card bobber so the tuned rod bobber can align over it.", "Code and chat terminals are inlined as separate adjustable panels because each card uses its own visual offset.", "Fishing gear is inlined from reference/fishing_rod_bobber_water.svg so handle, fishing line, and bobber geometry can be tuned.", "Zzz and the sleeping-loop runtime script are removed.", "Mouth dash clipping is removed to restore a small awake smile." ] }

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly), revealed by turn pages sliding sideways

g.transform: translate(0 0) translate(34 24) rotate(0) skewX(0) scale(1 1) translate(-34 -24)
